page.title: Template:NHK仙台放送局アナウンス専任部長

revision.comment: Bot: [[Template:Pp|保護テンプレート]]の除去
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: recategorize [[Category:NHKのアナウンサーのテンプレート]] → [[Category:NHK announcer template]] [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22534966935|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
